definition: OPEC+ spare capacity at 5-6 Mb/d effectively eliminates the energy-driven commodity inflation → rate shock → equity drawdown pathway. Non-OPEC supply growth outpaces demand growth, Brent at $70-80 consistent with loose balance.
evidence: Spare capacity verifiable from OPEC data
Brent at $70-80 consistent with loose balance
Positive commodity-equity correlation (+0.2 to +0.3) confirms demand-pull not supply-push
Pair_1 debate confirmed as agreement point 4
Conditional on no major supply disruption (Strait of Hormuz, Libya)
open_questions: What geopolitical scenarios could eliminate the spare capacity buffer?
Is the remaining metals/power-driven inflation channel sufficient to trigger a rate shock?
